name: Vasterra
short_description: Enter the world of Helheim and build your village on a desolate island in the underworld of Norse mythology. Improve and maintain your village by gathering resources and defending it from enemy attacks. Can you thrive in the realm of the dead?
detailed_description:
Vasterra

Embark on an epic journey through the mythical realm of Helheim in "Vasterra." In this building and strategy game, you find yourself on a desolate island located in the underworld of Norse mythology, surrounded by the mysterious and gloomy landscape of the realm of the dead.

Game Features:

Construction and Management: Build your village from scratch, improving and expanding your structures to create a thriving haven amidst the chaos of Helheim.

Resource Gathering: Explore the island to collect vital resources such as wood, stone, and food. Manage your supplies carefully to ensure your community's survival.

Strategic Defense: Protect your village from the fierce creatures and enemies lurking in Helheim. Strengthen your defenses, train brave warriors, and devise combat strategies to keep invaders at bay.

Are you ready to build, defend, and thrive in the dark and enigmatic realm of the dead? The survival of your village is in your hands!
